title: PovertyCraft
description: PovertyCraft is a modpack focused on exploration, light RPG elements, and immersive building. It adds new biomes, structures, dungeons, nothing overly complex. Don't take the name seriously, it's a joke between friends.
body:
## PovertyCraft is an early-stage modpack focused on exploration, light RPG elements, and immersive gameplay. 

It adds new biomes, structures, dungeons, and plenty of content to discover, but it’s still a work in progress. **Expect things to change as development continues, and be ready for a few issues here and there.**

The name is a **joke** between friends—don't take it seriously! 

This modpack is intended for multiplayer survival and casual play, but as it's still early in development, **things might break or need adjustments**. If you're looking for a polished experience, this might not be it yet, but if you're cool with testing things out and helping shape the pack, then jump in and have fun!
